lines.english: How many cards did the writer send?
lines.chinese: 作者寄了多少张明信片？
lines.raw: How many cards did the writer send? | 作者寄了多少张明信片？

lines.chinese: 明信片总是破坏我的假期。
lines.raw: Postcards always spoil my holidays. | 明信片总是破坏我的假期。

lines.english: Last summer, I went to Italy.
lines.chinese: 去年夏天，我去了意大利。
lines.raw: Last summer, I went to Italy. | 去年夏天，我去了意大利。

lines.english: I visited museums and sat in public gardens.
lines.chinese: 我参观了博物馆，并坐在公共花园里。
lines.raw: I visited museums and sat in public gardens. | 我参观了博物馆，并坐在公共花园里。

lines.english: A friendly waiter taught me a few words of Italian.
lines.chinese: 一位友好的服务员教了我几句意大利语。
lines.raw: A friendly waiter taught me a few words of Italian. | 一位友好的服务员教了我几句意大利语。

lines.english: Then he lent me a book.
lines.raw: Then he lent me a book. | 然后他借给我一本书。

lines.english: I read a few lines, but I did not understand a word.
lines.chinese: 我读了几行，但一个字也看不懂。
lines.raw: I read a few lines, but I did not understand a word. | 我读了几行，但一个字也看不懂。
Everyday I thought about postcards. | 每天我都想着明信片。
My holidays passed quickly, | 我的假期过得很快，

lines.english: but I did not send cards to my friends.
lines.chinese: 但我没有给朋友们寄明信片。
lines.raw: but I did not send cards to my friends. | 但我没有给朋友们寄明信片。

lines.english: On the last day I made a big decision.
lines.chinese: 在最后一天，我做了一个重大决定。
lines.raw: On the last day I made a big decision. | 在最后一天，我做了一个重大决定。

lines.english: I got up early and bought thirty-seven cards.
lines.chinese: 我起得很早，买了三十七张明信片。
lines.raw: I got up early and bought thirty-seven cards. | 我起得很早，买了三十七张明信片。

lines.english: I spent the whole day in my room,
lines.chinese: 我在房间里待了一整天，
lines.raw: I spent the whole day in my room, | 我在房间里待了一整天，

lines.english: but I did not write a single card!
lines.chinese: 但我一张明信片也没写！
lines.raw: but I did not write a single card! | 但我一张明信片也没写！
